name: Void Feast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Void" Spell/Trap from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon up to 3 "Infernoid" monsters from your Deck, whose total Levels exactly equal 8, ignoring their Summoning conditions.
eff: Send 1 "Void" Spell/Trap from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon up to 3 "Infernoid" monsters from your Deck, whose total Levels exactly equal 8, ignoring their Summoning conditions.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
